programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Hart to Hart

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey try to find a way to arrest the son of a immunized diplomat whos using his nations embassy to avoid justice after hitting a poor man with his car

programme.title: Starsky 301
programme.desc: Starsky 301

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Dr Robert Winchester is a brilliant researcher and a former test pilot who helped design Airwolf Now hes asking for Hawkes help in test flying a simulator that hes designed to enable the Firm to train future test pilots to fly Airwolf Reluctantly Hawke agrees but determines that the simulators feel is a little off Archangel convinces Hawke to let Winchester hook up the real Airwolf to his computers in order to get a more realistic demonstration This allows Winchester to engage in a little friendly flying competition with Hawke but it also allows the Russians to nearly get their hands on the high tech super copter

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Jack tries to rescue Ryan and Micki when theyre locked in a vault with a mystic urn that conjures up torturous nightmares

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.desc: Hanks twin brother arrives and Greta enlists him to help bump off her new husband Meanwhile Gretas sister and her husband drop in for a surprise visit

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Faded playwright Arthur Brown uses electronic equipment to record private chats of other people as inspiration for his work His subject Diane is having an affair with Carla Magnuson When Dianes husband finds out everyone is in danger

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Unethical psychiatrist Dr Peter Milne gets romantically involved with unstable Sara Kendal His manipulation of her mind and emotions makes her illness worsen When she cant tell dreams from reality he becomes her rages target

programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.desc: A missing military jet pack washes up on the island and The Professor tries to figure out a way to use it for their rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George is the perfect houseguest for all the McCoys - except Grampa

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kates mother and her fiancé visit the McCoys Kate feels theres something not right about the couple

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ runs afoul of Clearwaters power broker Jason T Rockman when he agrees to take Dr Winters and a group of her mental patients to a local carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Its Rogers birthday and hes angry with Mister Ed for eating apples from his trees

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilber enters into a televised debate against a respected member of the community who wants to ban horses from the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans 230

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer makes friends with a hillbilly named Branch

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dan helps a nun locate some property that was bequeathed to her He learns that the property is the land that Roths hotel is on While Roth tries to deal with her Someone tries to kill her

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Maxs long-dead ex-wife suddenly reappears kidnapping and a hot diamond necklace are not far behind

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Joannas Aunt Louise who dislikes Dick and tried to stop their wedding comes for a visit

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Joanna tries to sell a house to a fan of her real estate television show only to discover he has a crush on her Meanwhile Stephanie and Michael plan to charge the townspeople to view their new daughter

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: After being unknowingly entered into the Outstanding Armed Services Family of the Year competition and getting picked the Major refuses to do it but the family wants to Things get heated as a rude family is competing against them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Japanese soldier arrives on the island thinks its still WWII and holds the castaways prisoner on their own island

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan head out in the ocean to a oil rig abandoned after a strange accident and find a drifting yacht with a terrified young woman aboard who says that her yacht captain was pulled off the ship by a gelatinous green sea monster which in fact was the result of the oil rig accident

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou has retired making Sonia the new boss but will she be able to keep the company going without her big brother Matt and Ronnie try to take a car away from of yuppie with an unusual taste for red meat

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia pushes the company to repossess more than just cars and the backlash from the team threatens to end her time in charge before its even begun Ronnie and Matt attempt to repo from a reckless motocross daredevil

programme.title: Beverely Hills Brats
programme.desc: A rich young boy arranges to be kidnapped so hell get more attention from his parents

programme.title: The Crooked Web
programme.desc: A restaurant owner becomes trapped in a plot to return him to Germany for a murder committed in the war

programme.title: The Dukes the Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke assist Texas ranger Jude Emery in tracking down hardened criminal Snake Harmon But they must rely on a little help from their friends as well as Boss and Sheriff Byrd when they find themselves kidnapped by Harmons henchmen

programme.title: Hercules 220
programme.desc: Hercules 220

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A mysterious death by poisoning creates questions about the safety of portal technology When a Taelon is killed in the same manner the investigation leads to a very smart scientist that even the Resistance was scared to work with

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens develop a new drug made from human brain tissue planning to use it to control human society

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane trades bodies with Swamp Thing after setting a trap using Will as bait

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane creates two cyborgs to hunt down the sole survivor of Dr Woodrues experiment

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Commander John Koenig the new commander of Moonbase Alpha leads the investigation of a mysterious disease at the station and uncovers evidence of a far greater looming disaster

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are arrested when they mistakenly pick up a crate containing a marijuana shipment Private detective Mason Dixon and his two beautiful female associates are convinced the Duke boys are innocent and they work together to bring down a drug-smuggling operation

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Rachels ex William Russ a riverboat gunman plans to leave their precocious 9 year old in her care

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A string of taxi caps are robbed and and the brains behind the robberies is an 18 year old high school senior His mother and deceased father were both robbery detectives

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rollins sent to investigate the case of a beautiful Latin American spy whos suddenly started acting suspiciously the IM force must find out if shes still on the right side - or if shes losing her sanity

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate abuse to babies One mother claims her child fell down the stairs but they find the father beat the child The baby dies The parents never wanted the child

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon come up with the idea of using dogs to sniff out marijuana smugglers Theyll have to find a dog and demonstrate it works while enduring their colleagues skepticism of the wild idea

programme.title: The Fugitive S04E06
programme.desc: The Fugitive S04E06

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Everyone except Heath who has met the stranger and knows some of his exploits firsthand extends a warm welcome to the aging cowboy who killed the murderer of patriarch Tom Barkley during the Barkley-Railroad War The man as it turns out is a friend to no one Hes a sociopath and mercenary who enjoys range wars and will sell his sanguinary services to either side And hes looking for work

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.desc: Chris Mattock is a black belt in Brazilian jiu-jitsu. He is now working on his stand up game in order to become a better all around MMA fighter.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While everyone is sleeping Herc lands on a planet in search of a buried treasure Monster Minds force them to flee and Herc sets a new course to find Audric to make up for lost time that takes them through a whole galaxy controlled by Saw Boss

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss blackmails King Phineas into luring Jayce with an image of his father to a planet where Saw Boss is ready to destroy him Saw Boss makes good his threat to pull the Vortex Plug which would allow the atmosphere of the upper level

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM learn to hypnotize people through their televisions in order to help in their plans to incinerate an oil base in Texas

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM kidnaps a young lizard creature known as a dinosauroid

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to the Arab Emirate of Yatzanistan to protect Prince Akars sacred sword from falling into the wrong hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain search for a seismologist that MAD has kidnapped for their evil blackmail plot

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Trindles recover their Tramulet with the Guardians help and turn Cy-Kills plans against him

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades hold a towns children hostage to force the adults to build a giant Ultra Zod which will conquer Earth and then GoBotron
